name: eimemory
description: Channel-isolated authoritative long-term memory for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Recall and retain verified Codex knowledge.
interface.longDescription: Eimemory adds bounded lifecycle recall, durable memory tools, verified outcomes, and fail-open operation to Codex.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use eimemory recall before durable decisions and record only reusable, verified knowledge.
